churn_detection.reasoning: The narrative concludes with reflective thoughts on the patient's current life situation and future outlook without any signs of abrupt truncation.

biologic_status.name: Humira
biologic_status.reasoning: Finally started Humira. Helps both Crohn's and psoriatic arthritis.

sex.evidence: Male, married, two young kids who don't understand why daddy's always tired or in bathroom.

years_with_crohns.evidence: Crohn's hit me five years ago.

treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started on mesalamine and short course prednisone. Helped initially but wasn't lasting solution.

treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Started on mesalamine and short course prednisone.

treatment_journey.name: sulfasalazine
treatment_journey.evidence: Tried adding sulfasalazine. Allergic reaction - hives everywhere.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Switched to methotrexate. The nausea was unbearable.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Finally started Humira. Helps both Crohn's and psoriatic arthritis. About 70% improvement.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Finally started Humira. Helps both Crohn's and psoriatic arthritis.

referral_pathway.name: Doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: Blood in stool finally sent me to doctor.
